summary: Iteration 10 — Final pre-launch QA on 3 new deltas (Onboarding Wizard, Reports 3-tab page, Users Reports-To column). Backend: 17/17 new pytest cases PASS (onboarding state/advance/skip/reset + role 403, reports total-summary/by-caller/by-manager + counselor 403, users reports_to create/list/update). Frontend: org_admin login → wizard auto-resumes at Step 4 (smart auto-detection works — demo org already has services/team/leads), violet→fuchsia gradient header + progress dots + 'STEP 4 OF 5' + X close + 'Skip setup guide' all render correctly; Skip dismisses wizard. Reports page renders 3 tabs (Overview / By Caller / By Manager); Overview shows all 8 KPI cards (Total Leads 33, Conv 3%, Revenue ₹0, Avg Deal ₹0, Today 32, This Month 33, Active Team 3, Lost 0) + Lead Source pie + Lead Status bar chart; By Manager card shows Arjun Mehta (#1, team_size=2, Priya+Rohan chips, 33 leads, 1 converted, 3%) + Riya Kapoor (#2). Users table now shows Reports To column with Select dropdown for counselor/telecaller/manager rows and '—' for org_admin. Counselor login does NOT trigger wizard. Counselor /reports correctly redirects (RBAC enforced).

ui_bugs.issue: Radix Dialog accessibility warnings spam the console: `DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for screen readers, and `Missing Description or aria-describedby`. Visual rendering is fine but a11y is degraded.
Many `width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0` warnings on Dashboard + Reports Overview. Charts still render. Cosmetic console noise.

issues: X icon top-right renders as a dark filled square at 1920×1080 zoom — looks like the lucide-x svg color/contrast against the violet→fuchsia gradient is not crisp. Functional (click closes wizard) but visually it appears as a black box rather than a clean X stroke. Consider adding text-white/80 + a subtle ring.

action_items: (Already fixed by tester) POST /api/users with reports_to returned 500 — ObjectId left in response payload. Fixed in server.py: now stringifies reports_to before returning. Please verify and keep.
LOW: Add <DialogTitle> (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) + aria-describedby to OnboardingWizard's DialogContent to silence Radix a11y warnings.
LOW: Improve X close button contrast on wizard header gradient (use text-white/90 + hover ring).
LOW (carry-over from iter 9): Set explicit min-height on Recharts ResponsiveContainer wrappers (Dashboard + Reports Overview) to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG fixed in server.py POST /api/users: when caller supplied reports_to, server stored ObjectId in user_doc but returned the same dict without stringifying — FastAPI jsonable_encoder choked on ObjectId → 500. Patched lines 2169-2173 to str() reports_to before returning.
Onboarding endpoints correctly gate advance/skip/reset to org_admin (counselor → 403). State endpoint accessible to non-admins (returns 200).
Reports endpoints (total-summary, by-caller, by-manager) correctly require org_admin/manager — counselor gets 403 on all three. Verified by pytest.
Smart auto-detection in /api/onboarding/state works as documented: demo org already has services + extra team + leads, so wizard correctly resumes at 'lead_source' (step 4 of 5), not step 1.
server.py is now ~4800 lines (was 4500 in iter 9) — even more urgent to split into routers (leads/billing/integrations/webhooks/onboarding/reports/platform).
OnboardingWizard.jsx should mount inside a portal AND under a DialogTitle for a11y — current implementation triggers Radix warnings on every open.

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 new tests + previous regression suites still green)
success_rate.frontend: 95% — all critical flows verified visually; only a11y/console-warning cosmetic issues remain. By-Caller tab content not explicitly verified in screenshot (tab switch confirmed, but my body-text check ran while a transient overlay was present; backend payload for by-caller verified correct with Priya/Rohan/Arjun rows).

test_credentials: orgadmin@demo.com/Demo@123, manager@demo.com/Demo@123, counselor@demo.com/Demo@123, telecaller@demo.com/Demo@123 — all valid, httpOnly cookie auth.
seed_data_creation: Test created+deleted 1 transient user (test_qa_user_iter10@demo.com) to validate POST /api/users with reports_to. Onboarding was reset twice (POST /api/onboarding/reset) for demo org during testing — final state is RESET (wizard will reopen on next org_admin login). Recommend main agent calls /api/onboarding/skip if a clean dashboard is desired for user demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new deltas (Onboarding wizard, Reports 3-tab, Users Reports-To column) verified end-to-end. One real backend bug found and fixed during this session: POST /api/users dropped to 500 when reports_to was provided due to ObjectId in response — now patched. Remaining items are LOW-priority cosmetic (Radix DialogTitle a11y, Recharts width warnings, wizard X-button contrast). Demo org onboarding state is currently in RESET state — wizard will pop on next org_admin login (this is intentional for follow-up manual demo). Counselor RBAC verified at both API (403) and route level (redirect).
rca of the issue: POST /api/users 500 RCA: In server.py create_user (~line 2157), reports_to was stored as ObjectId in user_doc, but the same dict was returned to the client. FastAPI's jsonable_encoder tried dict(ObjectId) → TypeError, then vars(ObjectId) → TypeError, then bubbled as 500. Fix: stringify user_doc['reports_to'] after insert, alongside the existing _id and organization_id stringification. Reproduction: POST /api/users with body {name, email, mobile, role:'counselor', reports_to:<manager_id>, password:'Welcome@123'} as org_admin → was 500, now 200.
